narrativeProgression.summary: Administrative records reveal prior attempts to bury this case.
narrativeProgression.beatNarrative: The same footage frame arrives through Telegram with different timestamps for each player.

threadUpdates.update: Tape Reset: The same footage frame arrives through Telegram with different timestamps for each player.
Peripheral signal tied to Frame glitch cluster remains unresolved.
Minor anomaly logged but not yet actionable.
No new movement on false lead this cycle.

evidenceDrops.title: Tape 17: Pinewatch - Day 05 call log
evidenceDrops.summary: Artifact appears authoritative but contains one intentional inconsistency tied to Frame glitch cluster.

imagePrompt.style: hyper-realistic forensic horror, analog imperfection, grounded true-crime framing
imagePrompt.prompt: Tape 17: Pinewatch ARG artifact Day 05. Type: call_log. Clue focus: Frame glitch cluster. Location: Closed wilderness watch station and ranger tunnels. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Camera: Canon EOS R6, 35mm prime, ISO 3200, f/1.8, 1/40 shutter. Visual defects: sensor noise, halation bloom, slight motion blur, fingerprint smudge, timestamp burn-in. Lighting: practical sodium-vapor spill with deep shadow falloff, imperfect white balance. Composition: evidence-forward framing, handwritten marks, believable wear, no cinematic polish. Subtle misleading cue included.
imagePrompt.negativePrompt: clean CGI, fantasy look, glossy studio lighting, over-sharpened edges, watermark, logo, gore fetish, cartoon style

audioPrompt.style: psychological dread, industrial ambience, noisy field recording authenticity
audioPrompt.prompt: Tape 17: Pinewatch call_log audio cue for day 5. Clue anchor: Frame glitch cluster. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Texture: low drone bed, distant metallic resonance, intermittent room-tone dropouts. Include one decipherable spoken fragment and one environmental clue (HVAC hum, rail click, siren bleed, pager chirp). Add mild tape flutter, codec smear, clipped transients, and uneven dynamic floor to keep it grounded.

interactions.messageTemplate: {{player_alias}}, before you move: chain-of-custody on today's drop is unstable. Confirm Frame glitch cluster and tell me if your last call still stands (decision.day_04.primary).
I heard my own words on a line I never called. If you still trust {{trusted_contact}}, do not forward this to the wrong desk.
Off-record: I can publish tonight, but your previous choice is already circulating. I need one verification point tied to Frame glitch cluster.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if decision.log contains any entry for previous day
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: You repeated yesterday's pattern ({{last_major_choice}}). People who survive this case learn faster.

adaptiveLines: Reference previous choice without breaking realism.
Acknowledge response latency as if monitored by live actors.
Escalate or soften tone based on trust flags and solved puzzles.
